question: Scenario: A retail organization is planning a new initiative. Scenario: A team is planning work in the area of ai strategy. Which approach best meets the requirement?
options: A. identify an AI transformation opportunity aligned to business priorities
B. define measurable outcomes and executive sponsorship
C. choose projects only because they are trendy
D. start without a business objective
explanation: The primary objective is to identify an AI transformation opportunity aligned to business priorities. Define measurable outcomes and executive sponsorship is an important complementary practice.
